Bash(# 재시작 이후\(02:18 이후\) 새 로그에서 rate limit, error 관련 검색 cat /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-02-19.log | python3 -c "" import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = str\(obj\) if any\(k in msg.lower\(\) for k in [''rate'', ''limit'', ''error'', ''overload'', ''429'', ''529'', ''credit'']\): # time 필드 출력 t = obj.get\(''time'', ''''\) print\(t, msg[:300]\) except: if any\(k in line.lower\(\) for k in [''rate'', ''limit'', ''error'', ''overload'', ''429'', ''529'', ''credit'']\): print\(line[:300]\) "")

Bash(# 어떤 모델이 실제로 응답했는지 확인 \(마지막 세션 로그\) tail -c 3000 ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/5c2a3de3-0aad-4386-845b-fa8f7bf82f38.jsonl | python3 -c "" import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: d = json.loads\(line\) if d.get\(''type''\) == ''message'' and d[''message''].get\(''role''\) == ''assistant'': m = d[''message''] model = m.get\(''model'', ''?''\) provider = m.get\(''provider'', ''?''\) tokens = m.get\(''usage'', {}\).get\(''totalTokens'', 0\) content = m.get\(''content'', []\) text = next\(\(c.get\(''text'',''''\) for c in content if isinstance\(c,dict\) and c.get\(''type''\)==''text''\), ''''\) if text: print\(f''Model: {model} | Provider: {provider} | Tokens: {tokens}''\) print\(f''Response: {text[:100]}''\) except: pass "")

Bash(# Check the FULL log including info-level entries for Telegram dispatch python3 -c "" import json with open\(''/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-02-24.log''\) as f: lines = f.readlines\(\) print\(''All Telegram-related entries \(excluding cron\):''\) for line in lines: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue if ''cron'' in line.lower\(\): continue try: d = json.loads\(line\) msg = str\(d.get\(''1'', d.get\(''0'', ''''\)\)\) t = d.get\(''time'', ''''\) if ''telegram'' in msg.lower\(\) or ''dispatch'' in msg.lower\(\) or ''allow'' in msg.lower\(\) or ''deny'' in msg.lower\(\) or ''reject'' in msg.lower\(\) or ''incoming'' in msg.lower\(\) or ''receive'' in msg.lower\(\): print\(f'' {t[:24]} | {msg[:150]}''\) except: pass "")

Bash(# gateway-cli.js에서 Telegram inbound 처리 찾기 python3 -c "" import re with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/gateway-cli-BlDZ_8TO.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) # ''telegram'' 관련 패턴 찾기 \(dispatch, route, allow 관련\) for m in re.finditer\(r''telegram'', content, re.IGNORECASE\): chunk = content[max\(0,m.start\(\)-100\):m.start\(\)+300] if any\(x in chunk for x in [''dispatch'', ''route'', ''allow'', ''session'', ''deny'', ''drop'']\): print\(f''위치 {m.start\(\)}:''\) print\(chunk[:300]\) print\(''---''\) "")

Bash(# ''drop'' 또는 ''silent'' 메시지 처리 패턴 찾기 python3 -c "" import re with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/gateway-cli-BlDZ_8TO.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) # allow/deny/drop/skip/filter 관련 패턴 for m in re.finditer\(r''\(denied|dropped|skipped|filtered|not allowed|unauthorized\)'', content, re.IGNORECASE\): chunk = content[max\(0,m.start\(\)-200\):m.start\(\)+200] print\(f''위치 {m.start\(\)}: ...{chunk[:300]}...''\) print\(''---''\) "")

Bash(# sessions-B9yXoHO1.js에서 inbound Telegram 처리 및 deliveryContext 설정 찾기 python3 -c "" import re with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/sessions-B9yXoHO1.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) # deliveryContext 설정/생성 패턴 찾기 for m in re.finditer\(''deliveryContext'', content\): pos = m.start\(\) chunk = content[max\(0,pos-300\):pos+400] print\(f''위치 {pos}:''\) print\(chunk[:500]\) print\(''===''\) "")

Bash(# sessions 파일에서 inbound 메시지 처리 찾기 python3 -c "" import re with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/sessions-B9yXoHO1.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) # dispatch, inbound, route 관련 함수들 for pattern in [''inbound'', ''dispatch'', ''enqueue'', ''lane'', ''route'']: for m in re.finditer\(pattern, content\): pos = m.start\(\) chunk = content[max\(0,pos-100\):pos+300] if any\(x in chunk for x in [''telegram'', ''agent:main'', ''session'']\): print\(f''패턴 [{pattern}] 위치 {pos}:''\) print\(chunk[:300]\) print\(''===''\) break "")

Bash(# gateway-cli 소스에서 sessions.json을 읽어 dispatch하는 부분 찾기 python3 -c "" import re with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/gateway-cli-BlDZ_8TO.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) # DM 라우팅 관련 함수 찾기 patterns = [ r''dmPolicy'', r''resolveSession'', r''getRoute'', r''findSession'', r''agent:main:main'', r''pairing'', ] for pat in patterns: matches = [\(m.start\(\), content[max\(0,m.start\(\)-100\):m.start\(\)+200]\) for m in re.finditer\(pat, content\)] if matches: print\(f''\\\\n=== {pat} \({len\(matches\)} matches\) ===''\) for start, chunk in matches[:2]: print\(f'' pos {start}: {chunk[:200]}''\) "")

Bash(# pairing-store 파일에서 allowFrom 체크 로직 찾기 python3 -c "" with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/pairing-store-UpJPgxa1.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) print\(content[:3000]\) "")

Bash(# gateway-cli에서 실제 인바운드 메시지 처리 + from 체크 로직 찾기 python3 -c "" import re with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/gateway-cli-BlDZ_8TO.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) # ''fromId'', ''senderId'', ''chatId'' 관련 체크 로직 for pat in [''allowFrom'', ''fromId'', ''chatId'', ''senderId'', r''normalizedStore\\.includes'', r''normalizedCfg\\.includes'']: ms = list\(re.finditer\(pat, content\)\) if ms: m = ms[0] print\(f''=== {pat} @ {m.start\(\)} ===''\) print\(content[max\(0,m.start\(\)-100\):m.start\(\)+300]\) print\(\) "")

Bash(# diagnostic 파일에서 lane enqueue 주변 로직 확인 python3 -c "" import re with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/diagnostic-D_de7-KX.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) ms = list\(re.finditer\(r''lane enqueue'', content\)\) print\(f''Found {len\(ms\)} matches''\) for m in ms[:2]: print\(f''@ {m.start\(\)}:''\) print\(content[max\(0,m.start\(\)-300\):m.start\(\)+400]\) "")

Bash(# 게이트웨이의 Telegram 메시지 처리 흐름 추적 # ''onMessage'', ''handleUpdate'', ''processUpdate'' 찾기 python3 -c "" import re with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/gateway-cli-BlDZ_8TO.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) for pat in [''onMessage'', ''handleUpdate'', ''processUpdate'', ''handleInbound'', ''onInbound'', ''handleDm'', ''dmHandler'']: ms = list\(re.finditer\(pat, content\)\) if ms: m = ms[0] print\(f''=== {pat} \({len\(ms\)} matches\) @ {m.start\(\)} ===''\) print\(content[max\(0,m.start\(\)-100\):m.start\(\)+300]\) print\(\) "")

Bash(# canonicalizeMainSessionAlias 함수 찾기 - sessions.json 처리에 핵심일 수 있음 python3 -c "" import re with open\(''/Users/stevemacbook/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/gateway-cli-BlDZ_8TO.js''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) ms = list\(re.finditer\(r''canonicalizeMainSessionAlias|resolveMainSessionKey'', content\)\) print\(f''Found {len\(ms\)} matches''\) for m in ms[:3]: print\(f''@ {m.start\(\)}:''\) print\(content[max\(0,m.start\(\)-50\):m.start\(\)+400]\) print\(\) "")
